text: Aaj subah nayi Sasu-maa ne fir taana maara ki unki khud ki beti ki pehli shaadi kitni successful hai aur main is ghar mein ek talaqshuda bojh hoon. Mera dimaag is naye sasural ke expectations aur apne bacche ki fikar se phata ja raha hai, par main thak kar baith nahi sakti. Apne bacche ko is ghar mein chhat dilane ke liye mujhe subah se raat tak ek masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi.

Naye sasural mein adjustment waise hi mushkil tha, upar se aaj Saas ne keh diya ki unki beti ke sanskar mujh jaisi aurat se kahin behtar hain. Meri kamar rasoi aur bacchon ke double kaam se toot chuki hai, par divorce ka stigma aisa hai ki main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti. Mere paas rone ka option hi nahi hai, kyunki is financial precarity ke beech mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye.

Aaj fir Saas ne comparison karte hue kaha ki unki beti ne kabhi parivaar ka naam kharab nahi kiya, jabki meri kundali mein hi dosh hai isliye pehla rishta toota. Main is naye ghar ke bojh tale dab chuki hoon, par 'log kya kahenge' ki dusri shaadi bhi nahi chali, is darr se lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon. Mujhe pata hai main physically aur mentally khatam ho rahi hoon, par main ek minute ka break afford nahi kar sakti.

Mehmaano ke samne aaj Saas ne mujhe sunate hue kaha ki unki beti sarvgun-sampann hai aur main ek single mother hokar is ghar par bojh hoon. Community exclusion ke darr se main is naye parivaar ki har zidd bina uff kiye poori kar rahi hoon, bhale hi meri tangein thakan se kaanp rahi ho. Agar maine zara si bhi kamzori dikhayi toh meri nayi shaadi mein kalesh ho jayega, isliye main thakan bhula kar ghar ke farz nibhane se peeche nahi hat sakti.

Bina dowry ke unhone mujhe apnaya hai, ye yaad dilate hue Saas ne aaj fir apni beti se meri tulna ki aur mere past ko leke taana maara. Is naye ghar mein thodi si acceptance paane aur apne bacche ka future secure karne ke chakkar mein main ek masdoor ban gayi hoon jise rukne ki ijazat nahi hai. Andar se poori tarah nichudi hone ke bawajood, mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai.
